questions.question: Which is the better work setup?
Which study method is superior?
questions.optionB: Studying a little bit each day

questions.question: Which boss is better to work for?
questions.optionA: Hands-off boss who trusts you completely
questions.optionB: Involved boss who mentors you closely

questions.question: Which is worse?
questions.optionA: A meeting that could have been an email
questions.optionB: An email chain that should have been a meeting

questions.question: Which is more important for career success?
questions.optionA: Being really skilled at your job

questions.question: Which is the better career path?
Which is worse on a Monday?
questions.optionB: A huge pile of unread emails

questions.question: Which lunch break is better?
questions.optionA: Eating at your desk to leave early
questions.optionB: Taking a full break away from work

questions.question: Which coworker is harder to deal with?
questions.optionA: One who takes credit for your work
questions.optionB: One who never pulls their weight

questions.question: Which is the better note-taking method?
Which is the worse school day?
questions.optionA: Pop quiz you didn't study for

questions.question: Which is the better team structure?
questions.optionB: Flat structure where everyone contributes equally

questions.question: Which is worse in a job interview?
Which work communication is better?
questions.optionA: Quick Slack messages throughout the day

questions.question: Which teacher style is better?
questions.optionA: Strict but you learn a lot
questions.optionB: Chill but you have to self-motivate

questions.question: Which is the better Friday?
questions.optionB: Grind Friday to have a stress-free weekend
